nl_query: For each active scanner device, show the device name, campus, total scripts scanned this month, number of rescans performed, average OCR confidence of pages scanned, and the timestamp of the last scan, filtering devices with zero scans.
failed_sql:
SELECT sd.device_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS total_scripts_scanned, COUNT(CASE WHEN sh.reason = 'RESCAN_NEEDED' THEN 1 END) AS rescans_performed, AVG((sh.extracted_metadata->>'confidence')::NUMERIC) AS avg_ocr_confidence, MAX(sh.scanned_at) AS last_scan_timestamp
FROM   scanner_device sd
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id
JOIN   scan_history sh ON sh.device_id = sd.id
WHERE  sh.scanned_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 month'
  AND  sd.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY sd.device_name, au.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) = 0
ORDER  BY avg_ocr_confidence DESC;
